Studio Botanical Art

Moss & Form
Collections Gallery Management Get in touch
Portfolio • Exhibition • Management

An artistic digital space for botanical works with presence, delicacy and premium value.

Designed to showcase lifelike artificial panels, floral compositions, terrarium worlds, aquascapes and nature-led pieces that sit between art, landscape styling and interior design.

View gallery Open collection management

Organic aesthetic

A calm premium visual identity shaped around texture, depth and natural composition.

Curated presentation

Each piece can be positioned as a singular artwork, a seasonal collection or a bespoke installation.

Simple management

The layout already leaves room for future inventory, pricing, availability and enquiry management.

Authorial pieces Organic visual language
Aesthetic direction Clean, natural, contemporary and gallery-led.

The page already frames the work as collectible art while preparing the foundation for a proper catalogue and enquiry flow.

Collections

How the work can be presented

Structured to exhibit the studio’s main categories with calm sophistication and a clear sense of value.

Installations 18 works

Botanical Panels

Statement artificial compositions with layered depth, refined texture and a convincingly natural finish for elevated interiors.

Wall Art 12 works

Framed Garden Pieces

Curated compositions blending flowers, foliage and decorative details in a contemporary artistic language.

Terrariums & Aquascapes 9 works

Nature in Glass

Small aquascapes and terrarium worlds made of moss, stone and delicate living-looking scenery.

Gallery

An editorial visual rhythm

The layout is already ready for real photography, with large clean blocks and enough air to avoid the feel of a generic shopfront.

Moss, stone & relief Natural Depth
Authorial installation Sculptural Piece
Nature aquascape Glass Ecosystem
Mini fauna & flora Living Details

Collection management

A refined base for artworks, availability and commissions.

This already simulates an internal overview for managing creations. Later, it can evolve into a real system with login, image upload, filters, pricing and status control.

Register a new piece
Edit title, description and dimensions
Set status as available, sold or in production
Organise by collection, style or setting

Contact / commissions

A digital presence that matches the sensitivity of the work.

This is a premium foundation for a real portfolio site. Next, you can swap the placeholders for real pieces, add the final brand, biography, Instagram, WhatsApp and a working contact flow or CMS.
